case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BEASLEY GARY M.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,854.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M.
WRIT TO SAN MATEO COUNTY RELEASED BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M. $1,854.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,909.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-20-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-22-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY GARY M.
